prestazioni: VR38DETT 3.8L twin-turbo V6 engine: Full billet aluminum block reinforcement by Tomei with 95mm bore and 88.3mm stroke, forged internals including Manley I-beam connecting rods, JE 9.5:1 compression pistons, and Tomei Type-S head studs for 1,800+ hp capability under methanol injection

Dual Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with 76mm billet compressor wheels, 106mm turbine wheels, and TiAL MV-R 60mm external wastegates, paired with a custom 4-inch titanium exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec-R with 304 stainless steel headers and dual 3.5-inch downpipes

Full Motec M150 ECU with individual cylinder fuel control, flex-fuel ethanol sensor, and Haltech CAN-based PDM for auxiliary systems, integrated with a custom VR38DETT-specific wiring harness by Power Enterprise and a set of Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors for E85 compatibility
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS R35 GT-R widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and custom 3D-printed ABS overfenders, paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon fiber hood by Seibon

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, Swift Springs (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear), and custom top mounts by GT-R Specialties for aggressive camber settings (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear), combined with Cusco Type RS 2.5-way LSD and polyurethane bushings

Custom 22x11.5 ET+15 front and 22x12.5 ET+12 rear forged aluminum wheels by SSR GTX01RR in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/25R22 front, 325/25R22 rear), with AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers and 400mm two-piece rotors
